title: espostoa lanata subsp. lanianuligera
intro: Espostoa lanata subsp. lanianuligera is a type of epiphytic cactus native to South America, specifically in the Andean regions. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Espostoa lanata subsp. lanianuligera include soothing skin irritations, treating wounds, and reducing fever. Espostoa lanata subsp. lanianuligera is often prepared as a decoction or tea, and can also be made into a salve or cream for topical application.
